🎯 Management Attention

generated 2026-07-20 08:45 UTC · guidelines: docs/incident-handling-guidelines.md
Under control?No — 5 items need immediate attention (2 escalate-now, 3 needs-management-attention)
Urgent vs smaller5 urgent, 7 need a nudge, 8 routine
Total open (active, excl. triage)20 +1 vs last digest (19 → 20)
2
🚨 Escalate now
3
🔴 Needs attention
7
🟡 Watch
8
🟢 Under control

🆕 New since last digest

  • INC-14830 — P4, opened 06:08 UTC, lead self-assigned immediately, Investigating — no breach

✅ Resolved since last digest

  • INC-14633 — closed clean — campeon queue alert self-cleared, no open breaches
Guideline codes legend (docs/incident-handling-guidelines.md)
  • A1 — Every incident has an owner and Head-of-SRE-level visibility
  • A2 — No incident is “just closed” — every problem gets an action
  • A3 — “It's just 10/30 minutes” is never an acceptable rationale
  • A4 — Recurring problems are escalated to the owning team for a long-term fix
  • B5 — Escalate early — not after hours without recovery
  • B6 — Security incidents are P1 until de-escalated
  • B7 — Critical-path failures are top priority
  • B8 — Night and handover incidents must not be lost — assign, don't just mention
  • C9 — Inform partners fast, even before root cause is known
  • C10 — Close the loop — recovery comms sent, partner questions answered
  • C11 — Comms accurate and crystal clear on impact
  • D12 — Informed decisions over passive waiting
  • D13 — Runbooks followed, basic checks done
  • D14 — Don't close while partner-side work remains open
  • D15 — The incident record is self-contained and phone-readable
  • E16 — Digest answers: under control? urgent vs smaller? new bugs? how many open?

🚨 Escalate now 2

INC-8064 slack intercomP1open 54d· evidence to 20 Jul 08:31 UTC
[P1] Intercom Incident : H2Bet Production
📝 Management note (2026-07-16) Andrea: correction — H2Bet ACCEPTED the interim workaround (discussed in the meeting with them and our Partner Manager, early Jul); that acceptance is why REW-176 was opened on 9 Jul. The 28 May rejection was the earlier 503-as-success proposal only. No sign-off is pending from H2Bet.

All three breaches behind the 🚨 flag (A2/A4, B5, C10/D15) still hold with zero change this cycle. This reflects the 16 Jul management note (H2Bet accepted the workaround) but the note does not resolve the underlying breaches. Now ~54.6 days open. Now ~55.7 days open.

H2Bet duplicate bonus grants confirmed as root cause within hours of the 26 May report, but ~55 days later there is still no deployed fix — roughly 300 duplicate grants/week continue. Per the management note, H2Bet has accepted the interim workaround and REW-176 remains parked on Rewards-team capacity until mid-August. Zero new activity anywhere again this cycle.

Open breaches
  • A2/A4: still holds — 54+ days in, no decisive fix deployed, REW-176 still parked
  • B5: still holds — zero evidence of any BetConstruct response or outreach progress since 18 Jun
  • C10/D15: still holds — Intercom conversation remains closed while incident.io stays open P1 with no incident.io-side explanation of the closure or REW-176 status
Proposed / pending
  • REW-176 interim workaround - ACCEPTED by H2Bet (per management note), still blocked by Rewards capacity until mid-Aug — no movement observed
Timeline (1)
  • No new Slack messages (only Giancarlo leaving the channel, non-substantive), no new Intercom parts, no incident.io update text since the last read — fully static again

→ Force a decision point: get Rewards-team capacity committed to REW-176 with a hard date, or explicitly accept the ~300/week duplicate-grant cost until mid-August and say so in the record.

INC-14476 slack intercomP1open 3d· evidence to 20 Jul 07:04 UTC
[P1] Intercom Incident : Mystake Production

Still 🚨: True P1, partner silent ~70h despite FT applying a stronger mitigation (recon service fully stopped) and two fresh outreach attempts (Intercom + direct DM) this cycle — but the account-manager escalation suggested across 4 prior digests still has not happened, now a 5th cycle. B5's 'system clearly not recovering with no escalation in sight' still applies.

Cocobet (Mystake) blocked users appear to 'unblock' themselves because the partner's daily recon feed omits users who should stay blocked. Joachim sent the partner a clear technical ask on 17 Jul; the partner has been silent since (Intercom confirms zero new parts, again this cycle). Giancarlo applied an internal mitigation (origin resync + recon blacklist) that evening. Andrea reassigned the Incident Lead a second time (Joachim → Giancarlo, 20:45 CEST 18 Jul) — but no account-manager escalation has followed across four consecutive digest cycles despite it being the repeated suggested action. Still flagged in this morning's SOC handover as 'no feedback from partner as of yet' with no new assignment beyond the existing lead. This cycle: Giancarlo stopped Cocobet's recon service entirely (stronger mitigation than the earlier resync+blacklist) and Ilke reached out directly to the partner contact (Sandro) via DM; internal frustration voiced at the partner raising a P1 then going silent. Partner remains silent ~70h since the 17 Jul 10:17 UTC technical ask. Account-manager escalation still not done — now a 5th consecutive digest cycle flagging it.

Open breaches
  • B5: still no account-manager escalation despite 5 consecutive digests suggesting it — system not recovering, only a stronger internal mitigation (recon service fully stopped) applied
  • C9/C10: partner silent ~70h (2.9 days) since the 17 Jul 10:17 UTC technical ask, despite two more FT follow-ups this cycle (Intercom + direct DM)
  • D15: incident.io record still doesn't reflect the new mitigation (recon service stopped) or the direct DM outreach
Proposed / pending
  • Resync affected origin via user migration and blacklist Cocobet's origin from the daily recon job — applied and confirmed ~19:47 CEST 17 Jul
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-17T08:42
  • root-cause explanation and recon-feed check request — delivered 12:18-12:19 CEST 17 Jul; no partner reply since, confirmed still silent through this run
Timeline (7)
  • 17 Jul 10:17 UTC Joachim sends partner a technical ask — no reply since, confirmed again via Intercom this cycle (~67h silence)
  • 17 Jul 19:09-19:47 CEST Giancarlo applies internal mitigation (origin resync + recon blacklist, ~20k players)
  • 18 Jul 20:45 CEST Andrea reassigns Incident Lead Joachim → Giancarlo — no fresh partner outreach accompanied this handoff
  • 20 Jul 07:00 CEST SOC handover repeats 'no feedback from partner yet' with no new action taken
  • 20 Jul 06:52 CEST Giancarlo stops the Cocobet recon service entirely to prevent further incorrect unblocks
  • 20 Jul 06:28 UTC Giancarlo follows up again with partner (Sandro) on Intercom — no reply
  • 20 Jul 08:54-09:04 CEST Ilke reaches out to Sandro directly via DM — no reply yet

→ Escalate to Cocobet's account manager today — 5th consecutive digest flagging this; direct engineer-to-partner DMs are not a substitute for a formal account-management escalation on a 70h-silent True P1.

🔴 Needs attention 3

INC-12022 slack intercomP1open 17d· evidence to 20 Jul 08:32 UTC
Shortlinks Redirecting to "Forbidden" page
📝 Management note (2026-07-16) Andrea: Solved as an incident. Only pending item is with Estelarbet, who need to identify which players were impacted — this is being checked and shared from our side; we need their input on which players complained so we can cross-check. Confirmed via the partner Intercom ticket.

Per Andrea's management note this is otherwise solved as an incident, but the partner's 17 Jul 22:35 UTC scope-clarification message has now sat unanswered ~58h (2.4 days) with no re-engagement from FT — a clear, overdue partner-comms breach (C9/C10) the note does not cover, still worsening.

Cloudflare-origin check blocked shortlink/unsubscribe traffic; mitigated same day, fix merged 02 Jul. Per Andrea's management note this is solved as an incident, pending only Estelarbet's cross-check. The partner (Gloria Morocho) clarified on Intercom at 22:35 UTC 17 Jul that the reported error affected ALL urls (not just unsubscribe), across both notifications and emails — reframing the cross-check's scope. As of this run, ~27 hours later, FT still has not replied; the Intercom conversation remains in waiting-on-us state.

Open breaches
  • C9/C10: partner's 22:35 UTC 17 Jul scope clarification (that the reported error affected ALL urls, not just unsubscribe) remains unanswered ~55h later — well past what should have been a same-day reply
Proposed / pending
  • CF-origin carve-out - merged 02 Jul
  • deliver full partner report - cross-check inconclusive, now needs to incorporate the partner's broader-scope clarification
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-02T13:29
  • last partner message unanswered
  • RCA/report promised repeatedly (13-15 Jul), still not fully delivered
Timeline (3)
  • 17 Jul 22:35 UTC partner (Gloria Morocho) clarifies scope: all urls affected, not only unsubscribe — no FT reply yet
  • 19 Jul run: confirmed still zero FT reply, ~27h since the clarification, no new Slack activity either
  • 20 Jul run: zero new Intercom activity; partner's 17 Jul 22:35 UTC scope-clarification message now ~58h (2.4 days) unanswered by FT

→ Reply to Estelarbet's/Gloria Morocho's 17 Jul scope-clarification message on Intercom today — now over 2.4 days unanswered on an otherwise-solved P1.

INC-11079 slackP2open 23d· evidence to 19 Jul 02:30 UTC
segurobet: no consumers on queue segurobet.consentsmanager (messages: 1, in: 0/s)
📝 Management note (2026-07-16) Andrea: this is in reality a BetConstruct platform issue (their Operator API returns 500 on consent updates). The partner is aware and has raised it with BetConstruct themselves; active partner correspondence (examples provided, regular chasing incl. by Andrea) lives in the partner channel thread: https://fasttrack-solutions.slack.com/archives/C08VB1RBJLF/p1782549375502499 — future runs should treat that thread as the live track, not the quiet incident channel.

Management note (16 Jul) held this at watch-level as a BetConstruct-side blocker with active chasing, with escalation if unanswered much longer — that condition remains met: Andrea's 16 Jul re-chase has had zero reply for ~4 days on a P2 open ~23 days with no FT-side mitigation. Zero new activity this cycle.

Segurobet Consent Manager remains stalled since 27 Jun on partner (BetConstruct) Operator API 500s. Per management note, the live track is the partner thread, not this incident channel. No reply there since Andrea's 16 Jul re-chase to Eduardo Nunes (BetConstruct) — now ~9 days unanswered (partner's last message was 9 Jul). New this cycle: James Hodgson left the incident Slack channel (19 Jul 04:30 CEST).

Open breaches
  • C9/C10: BetConstruct has not responded to Andrea's 16 Jul 12:54 CEST chase in the #ftcrm-segurobet partner thread — now ~91h (3.8 days) of partner silence on an unresolved P2 open since 27 Jun (~23 days); no FT-side mitigation applied in the meantime
Proposed / pending
  • notify partner + supply failing examples - done
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-06-27T08:36
  • last partner message unanswered
  • 'we'll check' (01 Jul) - no ETA ever given; Andrea's 16 Jul re-chase remains unanswered
Timeline (4)
  • No new activity in the main incident channel or the partner thread this cycle
  • 16 Jul 12:54 CEST: Andrea's re-chase to Eduardo Nunes (BetConstruct) — still unanswered
  • 19 Jul 04:30 CEST: James Hodgson left the incident channel
  • 20 Jul run: zero new activity in incident channel or #ftcrm-segurobet partner thread; Andrea's 16 Jul re-chase to Eduardo Nunes now ~4 days unanswered

→ Escalate directly with BetConstruct account management — now ~4 days of silence on Andrea's own re-chase, on a 23-day-old P2 with player consent updates still not applying in real time.

INC-13895 slackP2open 6d· evidence to 18 Jul 18:49 UTC
[FIRING:1] Fusion API errors Alerting (spinbet-terragon: 401 @ /external/pusher/:brand true)

P2, open ~6 days, partner silent on a direct technical ask now ~4.1 days with no re-chase attempted since 16 Jul — passive waiting per D12, still compounded by the unre-chased lead reassignment. Getting worse each cycle.

Fusion API 401 errors for Spinbet Terragon are blocking on-site notifications and Rich Inbox messages, root-caused to a brand-slug mismatch. The partner has not responded to the 16 Jul 10:29 CEST slug-confirmation ask; overnight, Andrea reassigned the Incident Lead a second time (Joachim → Matteo Rapisarda), and a bot check-in nudge followed — but no re-chase to the partner has been sent, and this is now the second lead handoff without a fresh outreach attempt.

Open breaches
  • C10/D12: partner has not responded to the 16 Jul 10:29 CEST slug-confirmation ask for ~93h (3.9 days) and no re-chase has been sent; incident now ~6 days old with player notifications still blocked for Spinbet Terragon
  • A4: second Incident Lead handoff (Joachim→Matteo) without a corresponding re-chase or new outreach action
Proposed / pending
  • Confirm definitive brand slug with partner before changing FT config - still pending, unacknowledged
Partner view
  • last partner message unanswered
  • accurate technical explanation + slug-confirmation ask sent 16 Jul 10:29 CEST
Timeline (5)
  • Status remains 'Waiting on Partner' since 14 Jul 12:34 UTC; incident now 5 days old
  • 18 Jul 20:46 CEST Andrea reassigns Incident Lead Joachim → Matteo Rapisarda
  • 18 Jul 20:49 CEST bot check-in nudge, unanswered
  • Partner slug-confirmation ask still outstanding since 16 Jul 10:29 CEST (~66h now) with no re-chase sent
  • 20 Jul run: zero new Slack activity; partner slug-confirmation ask from 16 Jul now ~4.1 days unanswered with no re-chase sent

→ Have Matteo Rapisarda send a fresh re-chase to Spinbet Terragon today — nearly 4 days of partner silence on a live P2 with no escalation attempted.

INC-10045 slack intercomP2open 31d· evidence to 17 Jul 09:55 UTC
[P2] Intercom Incident : Power Play Production

Continued thorough, collaborative investigation with Integration/PM engaged, but Stephen/Curt's scoping answer (due 'today' per last cycle) still hasn't landed, and the Intercom SLA has now formally missed both targets — worth chasing directly next cycle if it doesn't land today.

GiG (Power Play's upstream KYC) event-ordering bug leaves stale block tags. Robert Friberg (Integration/PM) asked Stephen/Curt to scope the update_epoch-based fallback fix on 17 Jul 10:22 CEST; no new Slack or Intercom activity since (weekend lull) — the scoping answer is still outstanding.

INC-14346 slackP2open 3d· evidence to 17 Jul 21:42 UTC
CF Threat Watch: brute-force-suspect,login-success-after-fails on ft-crm.com (41.76.35.208)

Handling was fast and correct (B6 escalation, false-positive determination), but the record has now sat unclosed ~4 days since the conclusion settled — still a minor D15 record-hygiene gap, not a live incident concern.

CF Threat Watch brute-force-suspect alert on ft-crm.com. Correct B6 security escalation flow despite paging misfires; team read is a shared-network false positive per Cloudflare's own classification. Status remains 'Investigating' with no incident.io updates since 2026-07-16T12:40:33Z; incident.io's own auto-nudge on 17 Jul asking to mark it resolved remains unactioned, reconfirmed again this cycle (zero new Slack activity, ~3.7 days since conclusion settled).

Open breaches
  • D15: incident sitting in 'Investigating' ~3.5 days with the conclusion settled (shared-network false positive) and the automated resolve-nudge still unactioned
Timeline (4)
  • 16 Jul 12:10 — alert fires, incident opened, escalated to P2 Investigating within minutes
  • 16 Jul 12:40 — last incident.io status update; team settles on shared-network false-positive read
  • 17 Jul 23:42 CEST — incident.io bot auto-prompts to mark resolved — still no reply as of this 19 Jul run
  • 20 Jul run: zero new Slack activity; incident.io resolve-nudge from 17 Jul still unactioned, now ~4 days since the false-positive conclusion settled

→ Stephen Riolo to click resolve/close now that the false-positive conclusion is settled.

Still a recurring pattern with no fix ETA (A4); Andrea's 17 Jul follow-up questions to Clayton Spiteri remain unanswered but it's only been ~3 days — held at 🟡, worth escalating if unanswered much longer.

Daily Data Science message spikes remain unresolved, confirmed no partner-facing impact, query-lightening fix still has no ETA. Andrea's 17 Jul 21:49 CEST questions to Clayton Spiteri (service criticality, player-experience impact via LC/Activities, SOC options) and the Incident Lead reassignment to Jeremy Curmi remain the most recent substantive activity — no reply from Data Science yet this cycle (only a bot resolve-nudge appeared).

  • 20 Jul run: no new Slack reply from Data Science to Andrea's 17 Jul questions; recurring morning spike fired again as expected (~7am pattern), consistent with known behavior

→ Chase Clayton Spiteri/Matteo Rapisarda/Giancarlo Laferla for the requested clarity and push for a firm ETA on lightening the queries.

INC-14331 slackP3open 3d· evidence to 18 Jul 08:36 UTC
Leonbets Activity Manager Groups Alerts Spamming

Real progress (fix proven stable) but no confirmation the durable merge (PR #490) has landed; kubectl-level mitigation remains revert-exposed on next OneClick deploy, now ~5 days without a human update confirming merge status (A2).

Leonbets activity-manager DB-saturation alert spam; Matteo's scoped-loading fix (PR #490) proven effective over 12h+, applied via kubectl-level changes that remain exposed to reverting on the next OneClick deploy until PR #490 is merged and the env vars made durable. No substantive new activity this cycle (only a channel-join system message) — merge status for PR #490 still unconfirmed.

8× 🟢 routine: Pokerklas deposit-events gap (P1, partner chased twice more via Intercom+Slack, no reply yet but well handled), Rewards GraphQL wemalaysia (self-cleared, Monday follow-up with Ryan Yu due today), Stanleybet Romania (fix deployed, partner asked to verify), Calendars 12play door-variation (fix deployed to partner env, awaiting confirm), CVE-2021-45046 base-image fix (Patrik-reviewed, deferred to next week), 12play/we88 fire-late fix (landed, monitoring), Betconstruct cron job nodes (new P4, lead assigned immediately), Sub agent dashboard-admin issue (first entry to the active list — sat in Triage ~3 days, accepted into Investigating this morning with lead in place, no partner impact).

No breach — continued proactive partner chasing and internal follow-up on a partner-side data gap; P1 open ~21h, well within reasonable wait given repeated FT-side engagement.

Pokerklas deposit-events gap (since 17 Jul) remains open; Giancarlo followed up with the partner again on Intercom this morning, and internally Simon Brown flagged the same gap to Gustav Tjäder with a bot nudge for a status update. No partner reply yet, but FT continues to proactively chase — open ~21h, not yet a breach.

Timeline (7)
  • 19 Jul 11:32 UTC P1 fires from Intercom, Joachim acks immediately
  • 19 Jul 12:40 UTC lead escalated/handed to Giancarlo Laferla

INC-14640 slackP2open 40h· evidence to 20 Jul 06:43 UTC
[FIRING:1] Rewards: GraphQL API errors (Grafana) Alerting (true rewards wemalaysia: TIMEOUT)

No breach — alert self-resolved, Monday follow-up with Ryan Yu is due today but morning is early; not yet a breach.

Rewards GraphQL API timeout/JWT-auth errors for the wemalaysia brand. Giancarlo acked within a minute; Sam Lundborg identified the pattern as wemalaysia's own frontend occasionally sending a malformed ('Bearer null') JWT before a valid one — a known, recurring behavior on their side, not an FT bug. The underlying Grafana alert resolved itself on its own overnight (19 Jul 20:39 CEST). Team agreed to raise it with Ryan Yu Monday; lead is James Hodgson.

Proposed / pending
  • Raise JWT-generation timing with Ryan Yu Monday — agreed, not yet actioned
Timeline (5)
  • 18 Jul 16:44 UTC alert fires, Giancarlo acks within a minute
  • 18 Jul 19:08-19:13 CEST Sam Lundborg identifies root cause: wemalaysia frontend sends bad JWT before a good one — errors already stopped
  • 18 Jul 21:21 CEST status moved to Monitoring with note 'will pick this up on monday'
  • 18 Jul 22:50 CEST lead handed to James Hodgson
  • 20 Jul: only new Slack activity is Giancarlo leaving the channel (non-substantive); Monday follow-up with Ryan Yu not yet actioned (still early Monday)

No breach — fix already landed, status honestly reflects 'Fixing' (D14), formal ownership in place, P3 judged leniently. Quiet again this cycle.

12play/we88 (Momentum) players received rewards 45-50min late due to RDS overload; a real fix landed and status has held at 'Fixing' since 10 Jul while monitoring and planning a RabbitMQ 4.x cutover. Sam Lundborg holds Incident Lead (reassigned 17 Jul). No new activity this cycle.

Proposed / pending
  • RabbitMQ 4.x cutover coordination owned by Sam Lundborg — no update this cycle

INC-14423 slackP3open 3d· evidence to 20 Jul 06:59 UTC
Container using an image vulnerable to CVE-2021-45046

No breach — Patrik already reviewed and deferred this to next week; no new activity or regression this cycle.

Log4j CVE-2021-45046 found on a staging container. Patrik Potocki personally directed Agustín to ack and a Linear ticket to be opened so it can be tackled next week — an explicit, informed deprioritization. Only a routine bot resolve-nudge appeared this cycle, expected given the next-week timeline.

Proposed / pending
  • Upgrade log4j-core - in progress
  • Linear ticket for next-week fix - per Patrik's direction
Timeline (1)
  • Patrik Potocki is a participant (already reviewed/deferred to next week per prior green_note); only new Slack activity this cycle is Giancarlo leaving the channel (non-substantive)
INC-14567 slackP3open 2d· evidence to 20 Jul 07:41 UTC
Sub agent potential issue: dashboard-admin agent type not allowed

No breach — lead was assigned promptly the night it fired; the ~3-day Triage sit is outside this digest's scope (triage is excluded by design) and it was accepted into active status this morning with an owner in place. No partner impact, internal AI Team issue.

llm-agent service rejected a dashboard-admin sub-agent invocation (allowlist restriction) plus a memory-limit query error, AI Team. Alert fired 17 Jul 22:13 CEST; Andrea assigned Jeremy Curmi as lead within ~11 minutes the same night (noting he'd merged related alarms and asked for stronger incident ownership), but the incident sat in Triage status for ~3 days until Jeremy formally accepted it into Investigating this morning (20 Jul 09:41 CEST) — this is its first appearance in the active list/digest.

Timeline (3)
  • 17 Jul 22:13 CEST alert fires, incident channel created
  • 17 Jul 22:24-22:26 CEST Andrea Azzopardi assigns Jeremy Curmi as Incident Lead, notes merging related alarms and the need for stronger incident ownership
  • 20 Jul 09:41 CEST Jeremy Curmi formally accepts the incident, status Triage → Investigating
INC-13889 slack intercomP4open 6d· evidence to 17 Jul 20:01 UTC
Calendars: Orphan (but live) door variations in the database(!)

No remaining breaches — fix now deployed and partner asked to confirm; self-contained record; P4 no player impact.

Door-only Chinese variation bug on 12play's Promotional Calendar 3 (no player impact) — fix deployed to the partner's environment this morning; Rewards Development asked the partner (Sook) to verify.

Proposed / pending
  • backoffice-v2 PR — shipped
  • rewards-backend PR — shipped
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-10T04:15
  • fix confirmed tested, deployed — incident.io summary describes it as shipped
Timeline (3)
  • 17 Jul 20:01 UTC — Sam Lundborg set as Incident Lead; status moved Investigating → Fixing; summary regenerated describing shipped fixes
  • No further activity confirmed this cycle
  • 20 Jul 07:45 UTC Rewards Development confirms fix deployed on 12play's environment, asks partner to verify
INC-14830 slackP4open 2h
Betconstruct cron job nodes

No breach - metadata only, lead in place immediately, P4, ~2.5h old.

New P4: LLM MCP scheduled job not spawning (Betconstruct cron job nodes). Reported and self-assigned lead (Giancarlo) within the same message, Investigating since 06:08 UTC.

Timeline (1)
  • 20 Jul 06:08 UTC opened, lead self-assigned same time
